# Copilot Instructions

## Deployment verification

After committing any fix, wait for the Cloudflare Pages continuous deployment to finish (typically under a minute). Cloudflare will post a comment to the PR with the preview URL. Open that URL and manually verify the fix before moving on.

## PR title

When finalizing or updating a PR, update the PR title to summarize all changes in the current PR, not just the changes from the last round of revision.
